full_text:
Huang Zu 黃祖
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huang Zu (黃祖). Served under Liu Biao. Later killed by Gan Ning at Xiakou. Huang Zu was affiliated with Liu Biao. Huang Zu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
